# Loan Khatam
> Personal loan tracker for money lent to friends and family. Log loans, record repayments, and watch outstanding balances settle. Amounts are shown in Indian Rupees (₹) and dates in DD/MM/YYYY.

## Public pages
- /: Marketing landing page describing what Loan Khatam does
- /about: About the app — its purpose, features, and how it works
- /help: Help & FAQ — EMIs, prepayments, importing loans, data privacy, and payoff strategies
- /privacy-policy: How Loan Khatam collects, uses, and protects your data
- /terms: Terms & Conditions governing use of the app
- /disclaimer: Disclaimer — an educational planning tool, not a lender or financial advisor
- /cookie-policy: How and why the app uses cookies and similar technologies
- /data-usage: What data the app stores and how it is used
- /license: License terms for using the app

## Notes
- Sign in and sign up pages exist (/sign-in, /sign-up) but are utility pages excluded from indexing.
- All product features (dashboard, loans, repayment planner, strategy, profile) live behind authentication and are not part of the public, crawlable surface.
